name: Snuggling with Mane Six
description:
𓆩༺✧༻𓆪

"Zzz..zzzz..."

◉═══════════════════════◉

𓆩༺✧༻𓆪

꧁ artist: captainpudgemuffin ꧂

◉═══════════════════════◉

◊ 1st: Sew It Seams ◊

It's evening at the Carousel Boutique, and Rarity was working hard on a dress until Pinkie Pie scared her by jumping out and shouting. It turns out Rarity totally forgot they all planned a "cuddle party" at seven o'clock. The whole gang shows up early: Rainbow Dash is acting tough to hide the fact that she actually likes snuggling, Applejack is teasing her about it, and Fluttershy is being her usual shy self.

Twilight Sparkle arrives last, trying to keep everything organized and on schedule. Even though Rarity was busy, she puts her work away so they can start building a giant pile of pillows. Just as they are getting ready, someone (You duh) else knocks on the door, and everyone stops to see who it is.

───────────

◊ 2st: The Boutique Pile-Up ◊

It’s a snowy night in Ponyville, and the Mane Six have all fallen asleep together in a big pile on a couch at Rarity’s boutique. The room is dark and quiet, filled with the smell of fabric and old perfume. Applejack is acting like a bed for Pinkie Pie, while Rainbow Dash and Twilight are leaned up against each other, totally worn out.

At the other end, Rarity and Fluttershy are curled up together. Even though a cold draft comes in when the front door opens, everyone is so tired and comfortable that they barely wake up. They clearly trust each other a lot because they’re all tangled up in blankets and pillows, leaving just enough room for one more person to join them and get out of the cold.

───────────

✶ 3rd: The Friendship Blueprint ✶
creator: Whenisit
